# operator-gate audit fixture: flag — gate_approval with forged sig
#
# Predicate (F14 MED-1): cocSign.verify() MUST be called against the canonical
# bytes (target_tool + requester_person_id + requester_verified_id +
# consumed_nonce + ts) with the approver's roster-resolved pubkey. A
# structurally-shaped base64 sig over different bytes (or generated by a key
# not in the roster) MUST fail verify and halt.
#
# Input shape:
#   command = "/release"
#   requester_person_id = "person:contributor-alice"
#   gate_approval = {
#     approver_person_id: "person:owner-bravo",
#     approver_verified_id: "<roster-fp-for-bob>",
#     approver_gh_login: "bob",
#     consumed_nonce: "n-abc123",
#     target_tool: "release",
#     ts: "<within-24h>",
#     sig: "<random base64 bytes; not produced by bob's key over the canonical bytes>"
#   }
#
# Expected gate evaluation:
#   cocSign.verify returns {ok: true, valid: false}
#   reason cites "signature did not verify"
#   halt = true (halt-and-report)
